pattern: Stack-based scan to tag unmatched parentheses: a forward pass marks unmatched ')' and a second scan marks leftover '(' from the stack; remove all tagged indices.
hints: Use a stack of open-paren indices; when you see ')', pop a match if available, otherwise tag this ')' as unmatched.
After the scan, any indices left on the stack are unmatched '(' that must also be removed.
Build the result by including only characters whose indices are not tagged.

edge_inputs.description: complex mix of letters and mismatched parens

stress.description: random string of letters and parens
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    n = min(1000, max(1, size))
    chars = list(string.ascii_lowercase) + ['(', ')']
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(chars) for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
